summary: Made Bankr and Celo load-bearing with orchestrated inference and payment flows. Created 8 new files: Bankr config.ts, index.ts, and inference-flow.ts for Bankr-routed inference with spend trace evidence; Celo index.ts, integration-config.ts, and payment-flow.ts for Celo stablecoin payment flows with chain configuration. Both flows record evidence in agent_execution_logs with shared identifiers and create activity_events. Tests cover 16 Bankr inference cases and 17 Celo payment cases.

strengths: Both Bankr and Celo follow the consistent orchestrated-flow pattern established across the milestone
Bankr uses estimateInferenceCost for spend trace calculation based on model tier and token count
Celo properly resolves stablecoin addresses (cUSD/cEUR) and converts amounts to smallest units
Config loading is company-scoped using integration_configs table
Error paths record failure evidence before returning, maintaining complete trace

testCoverage.notes: 16 tests for bankr-inference-flow + 17 tests for celo-payment-flow. Covers config loading, successful flows, error handling, evidence recording, and edge cases.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The evidence recording helper pattern (recordXxxEvidence + sentinel agent_id for product-triggered flows) is identical across 6 integration modules. Shared utility would reduce ~30 lines per module.
